USHARK directs you straight to the future

uShark is an innovative business model that aims to even out the differences that the traditional market brings between large and small investors.

Buy uShark
The Market of Cryptocurrencies

The financial revolution in a single token

Type

TRC20

5.7 B

USHARK Max Supply

USHARK Circulating Supply

uShark
Token
Features

Deflationary

When shares of companies will be sold, USHARK will be repurchased, making it scarcer and thus deflationary.

Activity Rewards

Earn more rewards through your community engagement.

Payment

Use USHARK as a payment token where you can pay at some partner from uShark.

Use for voting

As a Elite Club NFT holder you have voting rights and 1000 USHARK are 1 Vote.
